subject: Deal blocker identified
description: Upgrade deal is stalled due to pricing concerns. Anna mentioned the CFO (Beth Turner) wants to see clearer ROI justification before approving the $15k upgrade. Need to prepare ROI analysis focusing on time savings and efficiency gains.

subject: Negotiation status
description: Deal in final negotiation. Lisa confirmed budget is approved. Key concerns: (1) Data migration timeline - want it done before Q2, (2) Training for 50 users needed within first month. Omar Haddad (CEO) signed off but wants weekly progress reports during rollout.

subject: Renewal risk assessment
description: Delta Health renewal is AT RISK. Key issues: (1) Low usage in 3 of 5 clinics - need to re-engage users, (2) Erin Cho mentioned competitor demo scheduled for next week, (3) Open support tickets about reporting reliability. Action: Schedule urgent QBR to address concerns.

subject: Expansion opportunity context
description: Despite renewal risk, expansion to 3 additional clinics is still possible if we retain the account. Erin mentioned the new clinics have different needs - more focused on patient scheduling than current analytics focus. Could be $15k expansion if renewal is secured first.

subject: Renewal positive signals
description: Maria confirmed they're very satisfied with the platform. Key wins: (1) Reduced report generation time by 60%, (2) IT team loves the API flexibility, (3) Nina Foster's analytics team is expanding use cases. Should propose multi-year deal at renewal.

subject: Trial conversion concerns
description: Trial extended twice due to internal IT delays at customer. Sanjay is champion but doesn't have final budget authority. Need to escalate to Ravi (CTO) for decision. Trial usage is good but conversion timeline keeps slipping.
